---
description: "Use when generating code, code snippets, or example identifiers. Enforces camelCase naming in returned code."
---
# camelCase Code Output

- Use camelCase for variables, functions, parameters, and other code identifiers.
- Prefer camelCase in generated code examples and snippets unless the target language convention requires a different casing.
- Do not introduce snake_case or PascalCase identifiers unless the existing codebase or language style requires them.
